gigs.description: JustDeeDeeMusic will be playing the hits from the last six decades, while your chillin' out in the newly renovated Grotto. With all the nostalgic vibe of former Carrie Cerino's when you walk in, but with an updated and beautiful refresh, it will be a night to enjoy. https://www.facebook.com/events/1239899470554919/

gigs.description: Experience the magic of live music with Just Dee Dee Music! Get ready to groove to a diverse selection of popular rock, country, and folk songs spanning generations. Dee Dee delivers an unforgettable performance that's sure to have you singing along. JustDeeDeeMusic.com https://www.facebook.com/events/3425454991087495/
